description: Publishes a same-run readiness cascade only after the in-game readiness producer emits campaign.automation.ready from a healthy observer, stable campaign map, and command-poll-ready gate. The trigger is notification and routing only; it grants no gameplay authority.
condition: sessionReady, mapReady, campaignReady, canPollFileInbox, runtimeObserverHealthy, gameProcessAlive, and stabilityWindowComplete are true for the same run and correlation
requiredFreshness: The readiness packet is from the current game session and completed a 60-second stable map-ready interval.
